headline: Atmos Energy Corp (NYSE:ATO) Raises Fiscal 2026 Guidance After Mixed Q2 Results
summary: Atmos Energy (ATO) reported Q2 fiscal 2026 earnings of $3.47/share, beating estimates despite a revenue miss. The company raised full-year guidance and increased its dividend by 14.9%.

headline: Atmos Energy (ATO) Q2 Earnings Top Estimates
summary: Atmos (ATO) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +3.07% and -12.33%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

headline: Atmos Energy Corporation Reports Earnings for Fiscal 2026 Second Quarter; Raises Fiscal 2026 Guidance
summary: DALLAS, May 06, 2026--Atmos Energy Corporation (NYSE: ATO) today reported consolidated results for its second fiscal quarter ended March 31, 2026. This news release should be read in conjunction with our earnings slides which are concurrently being posted at www.atmosenergy.com.

headline: Atmos Energy Declares Regular Quarterly Dividend
summary: DALLAS, May 06, 2026--Atmos Energy Corporation (NYSE: ATO) said today that its Board of Directors declared a quarterly dividend on the company’s common stock of $1.00 per share. The indicated annual dividend is $4.00.
